title: Romeo i Julia: Tragedya w 5 Aktach
summaries: "Romeo i Julia" by William Shakespeare is a tragedy written between 1591 and 1595 about two young lovers from feuding Italian families. Set in Verona, the play follows Romeo and Juliet as they fall in love despite their families' bitter hatred. Their secret romance unfolds against a backdrop of street brawls, family honor, and escalating violence. Shakespeare expanded the traditional tale with vivid supporting characters and poetic language, creating what would become the defining story of young, star-crossed love.
